name: image_load_side_load_avkkid
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\AVKkid.dll" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\G DATA\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\G DATA\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\AVKKid.exe" and (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\G DATA\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\G DATA\\*"))))
